'''R2-V6''' was an [[R2-series astromech droid/Legends|R2-series]] [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]] produced by [[Industrial Automaton/Legends|Industrial Automaton]].

Owned by [[Gryseium Incorporated]], this [[Droid/Legends|droid]] was used by [[Sabel Axis Corazon]] to hold a [[Computer/Legends|computer]] virus she was going to introduce to the [[Premier Provisions]]' central computer. [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Agent/Legends|agents]] intercepted the droid and used it to foil the plans of Corazon and infiltrate Gryseium.
